concepts.finding: Cross-lingual word embeddings can be aligned without parallel data by exploiting structural similarity of embedding spaces: adversarial training aligns spaces, Procrustes refinement improves mapping.
concepts.implication: Unsupervised alignment of embedding spaces can create cross-lingual query representations without bilingual dictionaries, enabling multilingual search without parallel query data.
concepts.open_question: How well does unsupervised embedding alignment work for query spaces vs. general word spaces?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: An adversarially aligned cross-lingual query embedding space will achieve bilingual lexicon induction accuracy of 40%+ without any parallel data.
